title: Too many visible dashboards
excerpt: I can see far too many dashboards that aren’t mine, have never used and will never use is there a way to hide these or remove them altogether?

posts.author: courtneyg (Courtney Green)
posts.cookedHtml: I can see far too many dashboards that aren’t mine, have never used and will never use is there a way to hide these or remove them altogether?

posts.author: Adrian (Adrian F. Guzman)
posts.cookedHtml: Have you tried using favorites? You can favorite both a dashboard and boards.
